mechanics.excerpt: WEAPONS is not uncommon for both private citizens and soldiers to carry weapons All ranged weapons can fire single shot only (as opposed burst, see 118), unless specified otherwise in the weapon description General descriptions of weapons along with ay special (ules are included this section. Equipment ratings range damage and other data for all weapons can be found on the Weapon Table (p. 153}.
